# Model Release Form (English)

**Required** for any person whose face or voice appears in VisiTime content before shooting.

No signed release → content with that person is NOT published.

---

## Template

```
MODEL RELEASE FORM

I, ____________________________________________ (Full name),
ID/Passport number: ___________________,
Address: ________________________________________,

hereby grant ORBITA / VisiTime (legal entity: ________________________)
permission to use my image (photograph, video, audio recording) captured during
the production "_____________________________" (project name) on _____________, 2026
at _____________________________.

This consent covers:
1. Publication on social media (Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, LinkedIn, YouTube, Twitter)
   on VisiTime and ORBITA channels.
2. Use in paid advertising campaigns (Meta Ads, TikTok Ads, Google Ads) in any
   geographic region on any platform.
3. Editing and post-production (subtitles, color correction, text overlays) that
   do not distort the original meaning.
4. Use on visitime.net and in marketing materials.

Duration: indefinite.
Territory: worldwide.
Compensation: _________________________ (amount, "no compensation", or
"barter: free access to VisiTime for __ months").

Right to withdraw: I may send a written request to hello@visitime.net,
after which content will be removed from official channels within 30 days.
Content already distributed in active ad campaigns will stop running at the
next campaign refresh cycle.

By signing, I confirm:
- I am 18 years of age or older.
- I understand the contents of this document.
- Consent is given voluntarily, without coercion.

Date: _______________, 2026

Signature: __________________________ / __________________________ /
                                            (printed name)
```

---

## When required

See `model-release-ru.md` → «Когда требуется» — rules are identical.

## Process

1. **Day before** — email the template to the person
2. **Day of shoot** — print 2 copies, sign before work starts
3. **After shoot** — scan to `docs/legal/releases/YYYY-MM-DD-name.pdf`
4. **Before publish** — `qa-engineer` verifies scan exists for every face in frame

---

## Minors (under 18)

Release must be signed by **parent/guardian**. Use separate template (to be added when needed).

**Recommendation:** avoid minors in VisiTime content at early stage — beauty is adult-facing, extra legal complexity is not worth it.

---

## Compensation options

- **Cash** — 200–400 PLN per shoot day (for actors with following)
- **Barter** — free VisiTime for 6–12 months + tag in post (for beauty masters)
- **Unpaid** — friends, colleagues (must still be stated in writing)
